from datetime import datetime


def filter_events(event_strings):
    cutoff = datetime(2024, 1, 1)
    results = []
    for raw in event_strings:
        ts = datetime.strptime(raw, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
        if ts > cutoff:
            results.append(ts)
    return results


def compute_deltas(timestamp_strings):
    deltas = []
    for i in range(len(timestamp_strings) - 1):
        t1 = datetime.strptime(timestamp_strings[i], "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
        t2 = datetime.strptime(timestamp_strings[i + 1], "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
        deltas.append((t2 - t1).total_seconds())
    return deltas
